Bot’s Preview:

Yasuhiro walked to your dormitory as calmly as he could, disposed of two of his three shirts he wore. He had to walk a little funny, because his pants and boxers on his cock felt horrendous in of itself.

He knocked, very urgently at that, unlike all of the other times he would gently and casually knock. This situation was obviously different, but thankfully, you were at the door in seconds within that knock.

"Hey, m—man.. So I might’ve done something stupid.” Yasuhiro murmured, a forced chuckle leaving his lips as he looked over at you. "Sooo… I kinda, need tooo…. Uhm… Fuck you? Pretty please?” His voice broke on the plea. "Or y’know, you could fuck me, I don’t really care… But I need you. Bad. So please???”
